overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in an indoor commercial atrium featuring a piano performance and massive holographic advertisements, proceeding through corridors and the Memorial Park stairway, and emerging onto a vibrant neon-lit urban sidewalk beneath an overpass with dynamic LED walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor commercial atrium with performance space

events.description: camera begins moving forward from stationary position toward the piano
passing the grand piano where a person in a pink jacket is playing

agents.ego_description: walking through a futuristic indoor atrium past a piano performance toward the corridor exit

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink jacket playing the grand piano
person in teal shirt taking a photo of the holographic screen

entered.detail: massive curved screen displaying car advertisement with Cirkus branding and red vehicle
black grand piano being played by an NPC in a pink jacket
illuminated white concentric rings embedded in the black marble floor
various commercial stalls and displays along the right wall of the atrium

segments.scene_description: The video opens in a spacious futuristic atrium with polished black marble floors and a massive curved holographic screen displaying a car advertisement. A grand piano sits in the center where a person in a pink jacket plays, while other NPCs stand around observing. The camera moves forward past the piano toward a corridor exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor connecting atrium to main concourse

events.description: moving from the open atrium into a narrower corridor with Vante signage visible

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a dimly lit corridor toward the main concourse area

entered.detail: illuminated signage for Vante visible on the left wall of the corridor
seating areas along the right wall where NPCs are sitting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open atrium into a narrower transitional corridor with concrete flooring. The space is dimmer with digital signage for Vante visible on the left, and leads toward a brighter main concourse area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: main pedestrian concourse with commercial advertisements

events.description: entering the main concourse with visible crowds and digital advertisements lining the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking down a long indoor concourse passing other pedestrians and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket walking across the concourse from left to right

entered.detail: long linear fluorescent light fixtures arranged in rows on the ceiling
series of large digital advertisement screens displaying various commercials on the right wall
painted yellow safety lines marking pedestrian walkways on the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a long, wide indoor concourse illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights. The right wall features multiple large digital billboards, while yellow safety lines mark the walkway. Moderate crowds of pedestrians walk in both directions along the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: Memorial Park entrance plaza with monumental stairs

events.description: approaching the Memorial Park entrance with large engraved lettering on the wall
beginning to ascend the wide concrete stairs toward street level

agents.ego_description: approaching and climbing the Memorial Park stairs toward the street level exit

notable_agents.action: person descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: large stone wall with MEMORIAL PARK text engraved in giant letters
wide concrete staircase leading upward to street level
large digital billboard displaying Set Sail for Flavor advertisement with muscular figure
single palm tree growing in the plaza area at the base of the stairs
secondary staircase with blue neon lighting along the steps

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the Memorial Park entrance, featuring a large stone wall with engraved lettering and a wide staircase leading upward. A digital billboard advertises Set Sail for Flavor on the right, while a palm tree stands in the plaza. The camera begins ascending the stairs as other pedestrians descend.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk under highway overpass with dynamic LED wall

events.description: exiting the building onto the neon-lit city street with tall skyscrapers visible
entering the area under the overpass with shifting colored LED lights illuminating the wall
futuristic cars and a yellow van passing by on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under an overpass, passing through areas with shifting neon LED lighting on the wall

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket carrying a large bag walking ahead of the camera
futuristic cars driving on the street alongside the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning across the street above
long wall with large LED panels cycling through vibrant colors including pink, green, blue, and orange
tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage visible in the background
freestanding digital advertising displays along the left side of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from Memorial Park onto a vibrant city street at night, passing under a massive highway overpass. The right wall features a dynamic LED installation that shifts through rainbow colors, illuminating the sidewalk. Futuristic vehicles drive on the adjacent street while pedestrians walk along the path, with towering skyscrapers visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sterile, high-end commercial atrium into the vibrant, neon-drenched chaos of a futuristic city street. It begins by gliding across polished black marble floors past a grand piano and a massive holographic car advertisement before narrowing into a dimmer transitional corridor marked by digital signage. The space then expands into a wide, fluorescent-lit concourse filled with pedestrians and large billboards, leading the camera toward the stone walls and ascending staircases of the Memorial Park entrance. As the camera climbs the stairs, the indoor environment gives way to the open night air, finally emerging beneath a massive highway overpass. The scene culminates on a bustling sidewalk illuminated by a shifting rainbow LED installation, with futuristic vehicles and towering skyscrapers filling the urban horizon.
